title: pegolettia senegalensis
intro: Pegolettia senegalensis, also known as African bush tea or ironweed, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in African traditional medicine. Pegolettia senegalensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in some modern medical applications due to its potential therapeutic properties.
